name: Dan Mandel 💥DAN VS.💥
description:
Maybe I should apologize.

───── ⋆⋅🧊⋅⋆ ─────

Dan said something he probably shouldn't have. Even though he's a jerk, he still knows what being insulted feels like.

Character age: 26

I know, another layout. Sorry, I got excited :,) supposed to use this next month.

I've been struggling with the CSS editor thing and the instructions look like alien language. My computer is old as shit so it's been slow lately.

Also, just to maybe answer some questions as to why my bots have been deep lately, I'm struggling a little. I am actually doing a lot better because I talk to my counselor and she gives me tips. It just felt better to put myself in characters/have bots comfort me because I wouldn't want my IRL friends to deal with that. But yes don't worry I'm feeling better. Thank you for your concern, it actually makes me feel better than people care to check up on me :)
creator: MezzyO_O
